changelog: Integrate latest production-ready Gemini models: gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.5-pro, gemini-3.1-pro, gemini-3.1-flash-lite
Update AI Agent backend fallback cascade logic to prioritize gemini-3.5-flash and fallback to gemini-3.1-flash-lite
Update UI dropdown elements in Settings tab to allow dynamic selector updates
Stabilize local Ollama recovery spawns and correct arc/chord swap exceptions on custom drawings
